rows.description: Ingleby agency on 2 yrs 1843.44 Inbetween & Rent.
rows.notes: The latter part of the description 'Inbetween & Rent' is difficult to decipher due to faded ink and cursive script, 'Inbetween' is a best effort reading. The year '1843.44' is clear. Amounts are clear and valid.

This is a final total line. The original pence value was '12', which was invalid (>=12) per rules. It was converted to 1 shilling and 0 pence, and the shillings amount was adjusted from 12 to 13 to comply with validation rules. The numbers are otherwise clear and aligned.
